# Find Swim Spots — Swimming Holes Directory

> A free directory of swimming holes, natural pools, creeks, and water spots across the United States with safety info and local tips.

## Browse
- [Home](https://findswimspots.com): Search all swimming holes
- [Texas](https://findswimspots.com/texas): Swimming holes in Texas
- [California](https://findswimspots.com/california): Swimming holes in California

## About
- [About Us](https://findswimspots.com/about): About this directory
- [Privacy Policy](https://findswimspots.com/privacy): How we handle data
- [Contact](https://findswimspots.com/contact): Get in touch
